#  View a Report of All Specification Revisions 
##  Background 
Viewing all of your specifications in one place will help you differentiate which specification sections were uploaded into which set, which specifications have revisions, and which specifications belong to the most current set.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the **All Revisions** tab.
  3. _Optional:_ [Search and filter for specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-specifications)
  4. Click the links of the revision numbers to view that revision.


## See Also
  * [Mark Specifications as Obsolete](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/mark-specifications-as-obsolete)
  * [View the Deleted Specifications Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-deleted-specifications-report)
  * [How do 360 Reporting permissions work?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-360-reporting-permissions-work)
title: View a Report of All Specification Revisions
description: How to view a report of all the specifications uploaded to the Specifications tool, separated by set.
